header.title: Notes from the Harbor Fund quarterly call

gold.name: Harbor Fund
claims: The Harbor Fund closed its third fund at $95 million in May 2026.
The Harbor Fund plans to open a Chicago office in 2027.
The Harbor Fund's first fund was raised in 2014.
The Harbor Fund's first fund is fully returned to investors.

gold.name: Denholm Capital
claims: Denholm Capital will co-invest with the Harbor Fund in the Ostrava deal.

gold.name: Yusuf Adeyemi
claims: Yusuf Adeyemi is a managing partner of the Harbor Fund.

gold.name: Carol Strand
claims: Carol Strand works in operations at the Harbor Fund.
